_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT for the byExchange map. Promotion (promote-venue.ts) is ADD-ONLY: a newly-promoted venue appears as a new key with the SAME shape. PFE-WR-only — outcome_return_pct / Phase-E outcome WR must NEVER appear (Data Integrity LAW).
_meta.venue_status_filter: byExchange exposes status='promoted' venues only; shadow venues are NEVER public

error_contract: endpoint returns 200 with {} byExchange when no signals; never 4xx for a valid GET
cache_contract: served from getPerformanceStats cache (column-projected); refresh on the existing perf-stats cadence
add_only_rule: promotion adds a venue KEY; it NEVER removes a key or changes the per-venue shape. A KEY-value DECREASE or a forbidden_key appearing = Data Integrity violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: curl -fsS https://algovault.com/api/performance-public | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); be=d.get('byExchange',{}); allowed={'exchange','count','evaluated','pfeWinRate','byTimeframe'}; forbid={'outcome_return_pct','outcome_price','phase_e_wr','phaseEWinRate','outcome_win_rate','realized_return','pnl'}; bad=[(v,k) for v,obj in be.items() for k in obj if k not in allowed]; leak=[(v,k) for v,obj in be.items() for k in obj if k in forbid]; print('UNEXPECTED_KEYS', bad); print('FORBIDDEN_LEAK', leak); assert not leak, 'DATA INTEGRITY VIOLATION'; print('byExchange shape OK; venues=', sorted(be.keys()))"
